case_title: FREDDIE NEW VS. MN BEST BUY CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) [CURRENT HEARING: AUG-02-2024 AT 3:30 PM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW, FREDDIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF FREDDIE NEW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO., INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY NEW, FREDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE - CT CORPORATION SYSTEM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW, FREDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO., INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-08-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FREDDIE NEW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO., INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACE HARBAS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-20-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO., INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-06-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-21-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FREDDIE NEW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO. INC., IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACE HARBAS, EXPERIENCE MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT REGARDING MR. NEW'S TWO ISSUES: 1) REGARDING THE WASHER, BEST BUY AWARDED STORE CREDIT (DONE ON PREVIOUS HEARING). 2) REGARDING THE STATIONARY BIKE, BEST BUY WILL CONDUCT HOME REPAIR ON THE STATIONARY BIKE. ARRANGEMENTS FOR THE REPAIR WILL BE ASSISTED BY BEST BUY COURT REPRESENTATIVE, MR. HARBAS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOV-21-2024 HEARING IF NO REPAIRS HAVE BEEN MADE TO SATISFACTION. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVE LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2024 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JACE HARBAS FILED BY DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO., INC.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THIS CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY NEW, FREDDIE MN BEST BUY CO., INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW, FREDDIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO., INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY NEW, FREDDIE
